text:

0001-multimedia-jellyfin-Update-to-10.9.2.patch

poudriere ok
Tested on my setup (14 amd64)

There's a seperate disthfile for freebsd 13 and for freebsd 14 and later.
This is for better compatibility with ssl in base etc.

As discussed with bapt@ this time I still update from the binary distile.
Building from source (now that lang/dotnet is a thing) will be the next update.
